blended.narrative: Bromley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 54°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
